hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *.rs ]] && [[ -n "$cwd" ]]; then cd "$cwd" && cargo check --quiet 2>&1 | head -20; elif [[ "$file" == *.py ]] && [[ -n "$file" ]]; then mypy "$file" --no-error-summary 2>&1 | head -10; fi
